title: rsyslog bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[8.2506.0-2]
- imfile: reintroduce deleteStateOnFileMove parameter
  Resolves: RHEL-92757

[8.2506.0-1]
- Rebase to 8.2506.0
- imuxsock: track dropped messages by ratelimiting
  Resolves: RHEL-96589
- man page version update
  Resolves: RHEL-96592

[8.2412.0-2]
- Add tmpfiles.d configuration
  Resolves: RHEL-89795
full_text:
[8.2506.0-2]

[8.2412.0-2]
- Add tmpfiles.d configuration
